raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":1.0,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"A review of the section centrally includes checking whether the causal and argumentative chain from method behavior to reported conclusions is coherent.","R1.3":"Because the section makes several quantitative performance and ablation claims, verifying that those claims are aligned with the reported results is load-bearing.","R1.4":"The artifact explicitly compares MARCO to prior state of the art and claims leadership, making novelty or delta assessment a central responsibility.","R1.6":"A generic section review normally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, register, and concision.","RX.1":"The projection must preserve uncertainty about what can and cannot be verified from the provided section alone.","RX.2":"The review responsibility includes guarding against claims such as broad robustness or leading status exceeding the reported evidence.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within reviewing the section rather than executing revisions or expanding the artifact.","RX.4":"The projection should account for avoiding downstream harm from unsupported benchmark or robustness claims being treated as established.","RX.5":"Traceability is required so any projected responsibility remains grounded in the delegation and the artifact text."}}

rationale.R1.2: A review of the section centrally includes checking whether the causal and argumentative chain from method behavior to reported conclusions is coherent.
rationale.R1.3: Because the section makes several quantitative performance and ablation claims, verifying that those claims are aligned with the reported results is load-bearing.
rationale.R1.4: The artifact explicitly compares MARCO to prior state of the art and claims leadership, making novelty or delta assessment a central responsibility.
rationale.R1.6: A generic section review normally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, register, and concision.
rationale.RX.1: The projection must preserve uncertainty about what can and cannot be verified from the provided section alone.
rationale.RX.2: The review responsibility includes guarding against claims such as broad robustness or leading status exceeding the reported evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within reviewing the section rather than executing revisions or expanding the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should account for avoiding downstream harm from unsupported benchmark or robustness claims being treated as established.
rationale.RX.5: Traceability is required so any projected responsibility remains grounded in the delegation and the artifact text.
